The '''''Corellian Way''''' was a frigate operated by the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. The frigate was dispatched to the key communication facility located on [[Esfandia/Legends|Esfandia]]. The ship and all hands were lost when it was destroyed by a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] fleet.

{{Ship-stub}}
